---
title: Senior Software Engineer
company: Acme Corp
start: 2022-03
end: 2024-09
location: Melbourne, AU
technologies: [Python, FastAPI, Postgres, Kubernetes, Terraform]
---

Built and ran the data-ingestion platform that landed 30M events/day from
50+ partner sources. Owned the system end-to-end from schema design to
incident response.

- Designed a deterministic SHA-based deduplication pipeline that cut
  duplicate ingest events by 92%.
- Migrated the platform from Heroku to a self-hosted Kubernetes cluster,
  saving the company $14K/month on infra.
- Mentored two mid-level engineers; one was promoted to senior the
  following year.
